name: 虛偽溫情型（白蓮花話術）
description: 養女和父母用偽善的關心包裝自私的要求。表面是溫柔的勸說，實質是道德綁架和利益算計。觀眾能看穿虛偽，從而更加憤怒。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Ning ning. Now, Yinyan did many wrong things before, but she is still your sister after all. ... Ning Ning, Yiny falsely accused you at the company. She was wrong, but it's been so long now. Can't you just forgive her?
